headline: Netanyahu Says Iran War Isn’t Over Because Nuclear Material Remains
summary: In an interview with CBS’s '60 Minutes,' Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu didn’t rule out the option of removing Iran’s enriched uranium by force.

raw.headline: Netanyahu Says Iran War Isn’t Over Because Nuclear Material Remains
raw.summary: In an interview with CBS’s '60 Minutes,' Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu didn’t rule out the option of removing Iran’s enriched uranium by force.

headline: With Netflix new ad-free standard plan at $20, streaming's tipping point into old TV is getting closer
summary: The economics of streaming are nearing the point where cheaper plans with ads make as much if not more money for services like Netflix.

raw.headline: With Netflix new ad-free standard plan at $20, streaming's tipping point into old TV is getting closer
raw.summary: The economics of streaming are nearing the point where cheaper plans with ads make as much if not more money for services like Netflix.
